scope: Remove process-dependent cooldown drift from MiroFish, then rebuild the planned enterprise validation replay as a stable artifact

decision_context.prior_state: The enterprise choice-conversion tranche had landed, but the planned validation replay produced materially different results from the saved replay even under the same spec and seed.
decision_context.decision: Replace the process-randomized persona-domain cooldown hash with a deterministic md5-based bucket, rerun the enterprise validation packet, and confirm that the replay matches across fresh Python processes with different PYTHONHASHSEED values.
decision_context.why_now: Running the full 515-domain portfolio before fixing replay drift would have produced an untrusted ranked readout and made the next batch harder to interpret.

files_expected.purpose: Replaces process-randomized cooldown variation with deterministic pair bucketing.
Stores the stable post-choice-conversion enterprise validation replay.
Stores the diagnostic brief for the stable enterprise validation replay.
Summarizes the determinism issue, the fix, and what the stable validation replay says.
Captures the request, verification plan, and guardrails for the determinism fix tranche.

planned_steps: Replace built-in hash usage in cooldown variation with deterministic md5-based bucketing
Replay the symmetric enterprise cluster as the planned validation artifact
Rebuild the diagnostic brief from the validation replay
Confirm that identical spec-plus-seed runs match across fresh Python processes
Write the methodology note and update the transparent logs

expected_checks: Cross-process replays with different PYTHONHASHSEED values produce identical enterprise focus metrics
Questionnaire remains above the benchmark median on ensemble adoption
Renewal remains slightly above the benchmark median and still shows a retention-side bottleneck
RFP remains just below the benchmark median and compliance evidence remains clearly below it

guardrails: Do not add a new conversion or retention heuristic in this tranche
Do not change maintained benchmark membership
Use the fix to stabilize replay semantics, not to manufacture a stronger enterprise outcome
